prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约5800→19568→13079→10349→11340，2022年因省控线大幅降低出现位次暴跌异常，2023年起逐步回升，2024年新高考首年物理类回升至10349，2025年小幅后移至11340；近3年（2023–2025）位次在10349–13079区间波动，2025年基准约11340名；本省理科/物理类计划2021年30人→2022年29人→2023年28人→2024年31人→2025年27人，2026年计划仅7人，较2025年大幅缩招约74%，为近年最大幅度缩减，竞争压力显著加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第71名持续上升至2026年第63名，排名稳步提升，学校综合实力与认可度增强；2024年曾出现师德师风负面舆情，但2025–2026年声誉数据中无持续负面记录，影响已基本消退；抖音总排名第15（高热），但近年热度呈下降趋势；未见投档断档记录；教育学、中国语言文学、心理学均为A-学科，在师范类院校中学科实力突出，对报考师范类专业的考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业社会热度2022年明显升温后2023–2024年小幅降温，当前为分化观望状态；计算机类、电子信息类仍保持高热推荐；本省2026年物理类考生估算约79969人，较2025年80421人略降约0.56%，考生总数基本持平；陕西师范大学位于西安市，属西北地区，对吉林省考生而言属于跨省就读，地域偏好因素中性；该校在吉林省招生规模较小，2026年物理类仅7人，属于小规模招生，位次波动弹性较大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次11340名、2026年招生计划大幅缩减74%带来的竞争加剧预期、软科排名稳步提升的正面信号，以及考生总数基本持平的背景，按供需弹性模型计算后结合缩招效应适当回调，预测2026年物理类最低位次约6350名，区间5850–6850名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 5800 → 19568 → 13079 → 10349 → 11340. In 2022, due to a significant drop in the provincial control line, there was an abnormal plunge in rankings. Since 2023, rankings have gradually recovered. In 2024, the first year of the new college entrance examination, the Physics Category ranking rebounded to 10349, and in 2025, it slightly shifted to 11340. Over the past three years (2023–2025), rankings fluctuated within the range of 10349–13079, with a baseline of approximately 11340 in 2025. The provincial enrollment plan for Science/Physics Category was 30 in 2021 → 29 in 2022 → 28 in 2023 → 31 in 2024 → 27 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is only 7, a sharp reduction of about 74% compared to 2025, marking the largest reduction in recent years and significantly intensifying competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking on the Soft Science main list has steadily risen from 71st in 2021 to 63rd in 2026, indicating continuous improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2024, there was negative public opinion regarding teacher ethics, but no persistent negative records were found in reputation data for 2025–2026, and the impact has largely subsided. It ranks 15th overall on Douyin (high popularity), but its popularity has been declining in recent years. No records of admission gaps have been observed. Education, Chinese Language and Literature, and Psychology are all A- disciplines, highlighting outstanding disciplinary strength among normal universities, which strongly attracts candidates applying for teacher-training majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of teacher-training/education majors significantly warmed in 2022 but cooled slightly in 2023–2024, currently in a state of differentiated observation. Computer and Electronic Information majors remain highly recommended. In 2026, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in the province is about 79,969, a slight decrease of about 0.56% from 80,421 in 2025, indicating a basically stable total number of candidates. Shaanxi Normal University is located in Xi'an, in the Northwest region, which is an out-of-province study destination for Jilin candidates, with neutral regional preference factors. The university's enrollment scale in Jilin Province is small, with only 7 Physics Category spots in 2026, making it a small-scale enrollment with high ranking fluctuation elasticity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the baseline ranking of 11340 in 2025, the intensified competition due to a 74% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the positive signal of steadily rising Soft Science rankings, and the background of a basically stable total number of candidates, after calculation using the supply-demand elasticity model and appropriate adjustment considering the enrollment reduction effect, the predicted lowest ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 6350, with a range of 5850–6850.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Teacher Training), Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Guojun Class), Information and Computing Science, Statistics)
- Chemistry (Chemistry (Teacher Training), Chemistry (Duxue Class), Chemistry (Innovation Experimental Class), Applied Chemistry).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology (Innovation Experimental Class), Software Engineering, Artificial Intelligence)
- Biological Sciences (Biological Sciences (Teacher Training), Biological Sciences (Science Base Class), Biotechnology (Zheming Class)).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Geographical Sciences (Geographical Sciences (Teacher Training), Geographic Information Science, Geographical Sciences (Boshi Geography Talent Experimental Class))
- Materials (Materials Chemistry, New Energy Materials and Devices).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the Physics Category enrollment plan is sharply reduced to only 7 spots, and the ranking is expected to significantly advance to about 6350. Candidates with rankings between 5800 and 6900 are recommended to consider it seriously. Tier 1 Mathematics and Chemistry are traditional teacher-training advantage majors with the most intense competition; Tier 2 Computer Science offers good employment prospects but is not teacher-training oriented; Tier 3 Geographical Sciences and Materials are relatively easier to enter. It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, with Tier 1 as a stretch and Tier 3 as a safety option.
